businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker and 'Physical AI Platform' spanning autonomous driving, robots, energy, and AI chips
businessSummary.description: Tesla extends beyond EV sales into FSD autonomous driving, Cybercab robotaxis, Optimus humanoid robots, and Megapack energy storage. FY2025 revenue $94.8B, GAAP EPS $1.08. Q4 2025 gross margin hit 20.1%, a 2-year high. FSD subscription at $99/month maximizes recurring revenue. Key 2026 catalysts include Cybercab production in April, Roadster unveil, and the new Terafab chip factory announcement.

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Surged +4.52% from $355.28, pushing P/E even higher. S&P 500 avg ~23x, auto sector avg ~12x

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on 2026E EPS $2.08. Still 4x+ above growth stock average of 30-40x

keyMetrics.name: Q1 2026 Delivery Consensus
keyMetrics.interpretation: Polymarket: 76.5% probability for 350k-375k range. YoY +9%. Energy storage 14.4GWh record expected

keyMetrics.name: Terafab Announcement (today 3/31)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 247WallSt: Two advanced chip fabs in Austin. AI chip vertical integration. Highest bullish sentiment score (0.43) among today's catalysts

keyMetrics.name: EPS (FY2025)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Profitability still declining, but stock is trading on AI/robotics thesis, not auto earnings

keyMetrics.name: RSI (14-day)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Recovered from 31 to 38 on today's rally. Exiting oversold territory. Tracking S&P +2.91%, Nasdaq +3.83%

growthDrivers.title: Terafab Chip Factory: Tesla + SpaceX + xAI Vertical Integration (3/31)
growthDrivers.description: 247WallSt: Two advanced chip fabs planned in Austin, TX. Self-produced AI chips for Tesla EVs, Optimus robots, and xAI data centers. AI compute doubling in H1 2026. Highest bullish sentiment among today's catalysts

growthDrivers.title: Q1 Delivery Consensus 365,645 Units, YoY +9% (Report Apr 2)
growthDrivers.description: Polymarket 76.5% probability for 350k-375k. Energy storage 14.4GWh record. Sequential decline from Q4's 418k but YoY recovery focus

growthDrivers.title: SpaceX IPO Buzz, Musk Ecosystem Premium (3/31)
growthDrivers.description: SpaceX IPO expectations lifting sentiment across the Musk ecosystem (Tesla, SpaceX, xAI)

growthDrivers.title: Trump Iran War End Signal, S&P +2.91% Rally (3/31)
growthDrivers.description: WSJ: Trump signaled willingness to end military operations. S&P +2.91%, Nasdaq +3.83%. Broad risk-on rally

growthDrivers.title: Europe Sales First YoY Increase in a Year (3/31)
growthDrivers.description: ACEA data shows first YoY increase in new registrations since Dec 2024. Base effect significant but signals European recovery

growthDrivers.title: Cybercab April Production + Roadster Late April Unveil
growthDrivers.description: Fully autonomous Cybercab robotaxi production and next-gen Roadster unveil both scheduled for April

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 50%+ US EV market share, 8.4B FSD miles, Supercharger NACS standard dominance, Terafab AI chip internalization

moats.description: 8.4 billion FSD real-world miles. Impossible for competitors to replicate at this scale
Supercharger network adopted as NACS standard. Ford, GM use Tesla infrastructure
Battery cells, AI chips (Terafab), software, charging all in-house. Cost and innovation advantage
Synonymous with EVs. Zero marketing spend needed for demand generation

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: China #1, 100%+ growth in Europe. Price competitive

competitors.name: Zoox (Amazon)
competitors.detail: Robotaxi expansion in SF, Las Vegas. Austin, Miami trials

competitors.name: Waymo (Alphabet)
competitors.detail: Leading AV commercialization. 200k+ weekly paid rides

competitors.name: Hyundai/Kia
competitors.detail: IONIQ, EV6 expanding global EV share

recentNews.headline: Tesla +4.52%: Terafab, Q1 Delivery Hopes, SpaceX Buzz Triple Catalyst Convergence
recentNews.significance: 247WallSt: Three catalysts in 24 hours. Volume 73.4M (+19% above 3-mo avg). $371.35 close

recentNews.headline: S&P +2.91%, Nasdaq +3.83% Major Rally on Trump War-End Signal
recentNews.significance: WSJ: Trump signals end to military ops. Broad risk-on. TSLA outperformed GM +2.4%, Ford +2.9%

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: 'Tesla Rises Ahead of Delivery Report as Rally Eases Demand Concerns'
recentNews.significance: Apr 2 delivery report is key test. Weaker demand vs. stabilization narrative

recentNews.headline: rollingout: 'Tesla at $355, Valuation Concerns and Insider Selling'
recentNews.significance: YTD -20%, P/E ~329x, insider selling. Fundamental valuation concerns persist despite rally

recentNews.headline: Investing.com: 'Tesla Rallies as Market Shifts Focus to AI, Robotics, Autonomous Driving'
recentNews.significance: Market pivoting from short-term delivery weakness to AI/robotics/AV narrative

analystOpinions.notableComment: HSBC $119 (lowest) vs Wedbush $600 (highest). Today's rally narrowed gap to consensus. 247WallSt: Terafab had highest bullish sentiment

risks.title: Q1 Delivery Report Tomorrow (4/2), Margin Pressure Risk
risks.description: 370k+ units possible but price cuts may erode margins. Delivery beat with margin miss scenario

risks.title: P/E 344x with Declining Earnings
risks.description: 2025 EPS $1.08 (-47% YoY). Terafab thesis needs years to materialize. Insider selling ongoing

risks.title: Terafab is Long-Term, Short-Term Cash Burn
risks.description: Two chip fabs = multi-billion capex. No completion date. FCF pressure near-term

risks.title: FSD Regulatory and Safety Risks
risks.description: NHTSA probe escalation. Camera-only system under scrutiny

risks.title: War-End May Reduce Oil Prices, Weakening EV Transition Incentive
risks.description: Lower oil prices could reduce EV demand motivation, though macro stability is net positive

buyReasons.title: Triple Catalyst Convergence: Terafab + SpaceX + Q1 Delivery
buyReasons.rationale: Three catalysts in 24 hours. Volume +19%. Market treating convergence as meaningful

buyReasons.title: S&P +2.91% Major Rally, Macro Risk Easing
buyReasons.rationale: Trump war-end signal resolving biggest macro uncertainty. Broad risk-on benefits TSLA

buyReasons.title: RSI 31→38 Oversold Exit, Trend Reversal Starting
buyReasons.rationale: After 4-day decline, +4.52% strong bounce. Technical oversold exit underway

buyReasons.title: April Catalyst Cluster (4/2 Delivery, Cybercab, Roadster, 4/21 Earnings)
buyReasons.rationale: Multiple catalysts concentrated in April to sustain momentum

overallOpinion: Triple catalyst convergence today: Terafab chip factory (Tesla+SpaceX+xAI), Q1 delivery optimism (365k, +9% YoY), and SpaceX IPO buzz drove +4.52%. S&P +2.91%, Nasdaq +3.83% major rally on Trump war-end signal. Volume +19% above average

Tomorrow's Q1 delivery report is the key test. Consensus 365,645 units is achievable but margin erosion from price cuts is the real concern. Energy storage at record 14.4GWh is positive. P/E 344x with EPS -47% remains the fundamental burden

$371.35, approaching 50-day SMA ($387) rapidly. RSI recovering from 31 to 38. Terafab strengthens the long-term thesis but Apr 2 delivery margins are critical. Hold with upward bias, reassess after Apr 2

investmentVerdict.summary: Triple catalyst rally (+4.52%) with Terafab, delivery optimism, and SpaceX buzz. RSI exiting oversold. But P/E 344x with EPS -47% and tomorrow's delivery margin risk remain. Hold, reassess after Apr 2 delivery and Apr 21 earnings
investmentVerdict.horizon: 1-3 months (reassess after Apr 2 delivery, Apr 21 earnings)
